title: T-Deck: border router mode (WiFi backhaul)
description: Enable LilyGO T-Deck as border router with WiFi backhaul. ESP32-S3 + SX1262 + WiFi + screen + keyboard. Same as Heltec V3 but with UI for local config/status. Chunky, higher battery drain than Heltec. Board files exist at lichen/boards/lilygo/t_deck/. $60.
